'''dowapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keenish|keenish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keenish|keenish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dowapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowapithi|dowapithi]] || [[word:dowapiji|dowapiji]] || [[word:dowapishi|dowapishi]] || [[word:dowapiki|dowapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowaputhuthu|dowaputhuthu]] || [[word:dowapujuju|dowapujuju]] || [[word:dowapushushu|dowapushushu]] || [[word:dowapukuku|dowapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowaputhu|dowaputhu]] || [[word:dowapuju|dowapuju]] || [[word:dowapushu|dowapushu]] || [[word:dowapuku|dowapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowapufthuf|dowapufthuf]] || [[word:dowapufjuf|dowapufjuf]] || [[word:dowapufshuf|dowapufshuf]] || [[word:dowapufkuf|dowapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowapethe|dowapethe]] || [[word:dowapeje|dowapeje]] || [[word:dowapeshe|dowapeshe]] || [[word:dowapeke|dowapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowapothotho|dowapothotho]] || [[word:dowapojojo|dowapojojo]] || [[word:dowaposhosho|dowaposhosho]] || [[word:dowapokoko|dowapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowapotho|dowapotho]] || [[word:dowapojo|dowapojo]] || [[word:dowaposho|dowaposho]] || [[word:dowapoko|dowapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowapofthof|dowapofthof]] || [[word:dowapofjof|dowapofjof]] || [[word:dowapofshof|dowapofshof]] || [[word:dowapofkof|dowapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfthÃŸf|dowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfjÃŸf|dowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfshÃŸf|dowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfkÃŸf|dowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dowapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dowapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dowapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dowapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfthÃŸf|dowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfjÃŸf|dowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfshÃŸf|dowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfkÃŸf|dowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfthÃŸf|dowapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfjÃŸf|dowapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfshÃŸf|dowapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowapÃŸfkÃŸf|dowapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowapÃḊthÃḊ|dowapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dowapÃḊjÃḊ|dowapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dowapÃḊshÃḊ|dowapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dowapÃḊkÃḊ|dowapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowapathatha|dowapathatha]] || [[word:dowapajaja|dowapajaja]] || [[word:dowapashasha|dowapashasha]] || [[word:dowapakaka|dowapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowapatha|dowapatha]] || [[word:dowapaja|dowapaja]] || [[word:dowapasha|dowapasha]] || [[word:dowapaka|dowapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowapafthaf|dowapafthaf]] || [[word:dowapafjaf|dowapafjaf]] || [[word:dowapafshaf|dowapafshaf]] || [[word:dowapafkaf|dowapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dowapasha|dowapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowapshÃḋsha|dowapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowaprosha|dowaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowapmusha|dowapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowapyasha|dowapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowapnkshÃḋsha|godowapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowapnkrosha|godowapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowapnkmusha|godowapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowapnkyasha|godowapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dowawapasha|dowawapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowawapshÃḋsha|dowawapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowawaprosha|dowawaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowawapmusha|dowawapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowawapyasha|dowawapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowawapnkshÃḋsha|godowawapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowawapnkrosha|godowawapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowawapnkmusha|godowawapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowawapnkyasha|godowawapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dewÃḊpasha|dewÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dewÃḊpshÃḋsha|dewÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dewÃḊprosha|dewÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dewÃḊpmusha|dewÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dewÃḊpyasha|dewÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|godewÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godewÃḊpnkrosha|godewÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godewÃḊpnkmusha|godewÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godewÃḊpnkyasha|godewÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dowfapasha|dowfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowfapshÃḋsha|dowfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowfaprosha|dowfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowfapmusha|dowfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowfapyasha|dowfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowfapnkshÃḋsha|godowfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowfapnkrosha|godowfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowfapnkmusha|godowfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowfapnkyasha|godowfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
